subcodes.first_line: There are four qualities which I love to see manifested in people: first, enthusiasm and courage; second, a face wreathed in smiles and a radiant countenance; third, that they see all things with their own eyes and not through the eyes of others; fourth, the ability to carry a task, once begun, through to its end.
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
